title: updates on Glassbox FPIP
summary:
Spent the last few days finishing the FPIP work for Glassbox. I made the FFT detect phase angles now, which helps identify harmonic series properly. I also added a compute budget feature. If the classifier is sure, it uses less compute. If it is uncertain, it spends more resources to be accurate.

For the population, I added a way to inject fast-path candidates as seeds into the beam search. This makes the evolution start with better guesses. I also added holdout scoring. Now it keeps 10% of data back to check for overfitting. Finally, I added uncertainty-aware blending for operator priors. The model now trusts the prior less when the uncertainty is high. The roadmap is mostly updated and things are moving forward.
commitMessages: feat(fpip): complete remaining high-priority FPIP enhancements
feat(sr): add uncertainty-aware prior blending and refresh roadmap progress
